sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ مَدِينَةً قَدِيمَةً مَشْهُورَةً بِآثَارِهَا التَّارِيخِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam stari grad poznat po svojim historijskim spomenicima.
sentences.translationEn: I visited an ancient city famous for its historical monuments.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْتُ خَرِيطَةً لِأَعْرِفَ مَوَاقِعَ الْمَتَاحِفِ وَالْقِلَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Koristio sam mapu kako bih saznao lokacije muzeja i tvrđava.
sentences.translationEn: I used a map to find the locations of museums and castles.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيْتُ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ الضَّيِّقَةِ وَاشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Šetao sam uskim ulicama i kupio neke suvenire.
sentences.translationEn: I walked through the narrow streets and bought some souvenirs.

sentences.translation: Vrijeme je bilo sunčano i divno za obilazak.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was sunny and wonderful for wandering around.

sentences.arabic: الْتَقَطْتُ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الصُّوَرِ لِلْمَبَانِي الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Napravio sam mnogo fotografija starih građevina.
sentences.translationEn: I took many pictures of the old buildings.
